prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1HD-FTE turbocharged 4.2L inline-6 diesel (stock in some variants) with a BorgWarner EFR 8374 turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust by Fujitsubo, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise fuel and boost mapping (targeting 35 psi with E85 fuel blend).

Full drivetrain reinforcement: RCV Performance CV axles, Quaife ATB differential in the front and rear, and a custom 6-speed manual transmission conversion using a Toyota J160 transfer case paired with a Tilton twin-disc clutch assembly.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (custom valved for the Mega Cruiser’s 3,800 kg weight), polyurethane bushings from SuperPro, and a custom 4-link rear setup with adjustable panhard rods by Custom Offroad Solutions for rock-crawling articulation.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody kit (modified for Mega Cruiser’s unique chassis) with carbon fiber fender flares, custom front bumper with integrated winch mount, and a rear diffuser by Voltex for improved aerodynamics at high speeds.

Custom LED light bar setup by Rigid Industries (E-Series Pro 50-inch) integrated into the roof rack, paired with Hella Rallye 4000 spotlights on the front bumper and a custom snorkel by Safari for deep-water fording capability.

Interior overhaul with Recaro SR-7 racing seats (custom-molded for the Mega Cruiser’s cabin), a Momo Prototipo steering wheel, and a full digital dash conversion using an Aim MXS Strada display with integrated GPS and data logging for off-road performance tracking.
